title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long positioning at 77.3% long, with leveraged funds holding +1,029 contracts, may lead to a squeeze if market sentiment shifts.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding above 0.7072, with RBA hiking rates, AUD carry supported; however, retail sentiment is 86% short, indicating potential for a contrarian reversal.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals normal volatility — not a risk-on environment, while MOVE Index at 72.2 indicates relatively low bond market stress.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Breaks
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break, with z = +1.39σ, indicates JPY no longer acting as a safe haven, potentially impacting USD/JPY positioning.
